creator: moose@opera.com
text:
I am seeing the following boot errors from ACPI on a new PhenomX4 machine:

ACPI Error (dsopcode-0671): Field [ASSM] at 524320 exceeds Buffer [BUF0] size 880 (bits) [20070320]
ACPI Error (psparse-0626): Method parse/execution failed [\\_SB_.MEM_._CRS] (Node 0xffffff00011cd620), AE_AML_BUFFER_LIMIT
ACPI Error (uteval-0309): Method execution failed [\\_SB_.MEM_._CRS] (Node 0xffffff00011cd620), AE_AML_BUFFER_LIMIT
can't fetch resources for \\_SB_.MEM_ - AE_AML_BUFFER_LIMIT


=====================
Errors occur with GENERIC as well. Full dmesg:

FreeBSD is a registered trademark of The FreeBSD Foundation.
